lastReleaseMessage: docs: GDD best-practices table line counts reflect the v0.59.33 god-file decomposition (gameplay 976L, hud 905L)

barRaise.topFinding: One docs-only commit (v0.59.34) since the 07-05 full pass synced the GDD Best Practices god-object cell to the post-decomposition counts (gameplay 976L, hud 905L), touching CHANGELOG.md/GDD.html/project.godot with zero source churn; today's canonical audit confirms zero drift and both hard-rule gates pass. That commit closed a canonical-audit doc-cell item, not any bar-raise HIGH/MED finding, so health carries at 82 and every open finding aged one more run. The chronic stack is intact and unenqueued: the audit glob still ships null (observability-01, 8 runs), the em-dash entities and ASSET_SCALE_MASTER dead refs persist, LICENSES.md is still missing, and the one substantial chronic remains the extracted collision/pathfinding/navmesh and save paths having zero executing tests. v0.59.34 is a nineteenth straight internal/doc version with no net-new player content, so the next commit should be a player-facing M2 row, not another quality pass.

actions.title: Fix the audit glob at scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 (AUDIT-*.md to CANONICAL_AUDIT-*.md) and re-run write-dashboard-status.ps1 so the dashboard audit block backfills from CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-07-07.md instead of shipping null.

Add a SceneTree-driven headless test exercising the extracted collision/pathfinding/navmesh modules (resolve_unit_collisions, apply_safe_push, push_edge_ok, grid_navmesh.bake), including the two-perpendicular-wall corner.
Make the save write crash-safe: temp path, readback-parse, copy slot to .bak, rename verified temp over the slot; apply to the autosave-on-quit path too.

Add pathfinder/spatial_index coverage to run_tests.gd: a MAX_EXPANSIONS partial-path assertion and a get_units_near/get_enemies_near exact-membership assertion, optionally a coarse find_path timing tripwire.
Make M1 completion honest in .project-context.json: populate completion.remaining[] with the non-gating audio residual and set pct to match, or state exactly why it stays 50%.
Pin pathfinder/spatial_index and unit_collision.push_edge_ok with tests plus a lockstep assertion that push_edge_ok and iso_grid diagonal traversal agree on the two-perpendicular-wall corner.
Add a headless save round-trip test to run_tests.gd (seed state, save, clear, load, assert resources/day/research and a building/unit class+tile+hp survive, plus a corrupt-JSON negative case).
Add docs/LICENSES.md recording the Spine editor license tier, the spine-godot version and source, and redistribution terms for the shipped bin/windows/*.dll (dependency lens concurs).
Capture one peak-wave (day-28 horde) frame profile on a current v0.59.x build and log FPS plus top costs in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md.
Delete the ASSET_SCALE_MASTER lines from docs/ARCHITECTURE.md:5,:21 and remove or hardcode-with-comment the cfloat ASSET_SCALE_MASTER read in scripts/check_playability.py:43.
Capture a pre/post-decomposition per-frame profile diff proving the cost-neutral claim (folds into the performance-01 capture).
Replace the two em-dash entities in X:\YesAndEverything\brackish-rising\index.html:8,:57 with hyphens and grep the gate pages to confirm the sweep.
